mapper.select: /* IOE장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm , b.upload_timestamp, b.upload_date, b.device_stat, b.device_ioe_idx from ( select device.device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device.device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device.device_type, device.inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_ioe_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_reg_id, serial_no, inst_type, inst_purpose, data_period, data_cnt, ct_capacity, ct_capacity_list, pw_capacity, ch_cnt, ch_purpose, provider, vr_device_id, vr_device_grp_id, vr_owner_id, vr_action, vr_stat, vr_mod_date, vr_error, tm_voltage, tm_pulse, tm_ct_ratio, tm_pt_tatio, network_conf, options, create_timestamp, create_date, upload_timestamp, upload_date, device_stat, reg_date from tb_device_ioe where 1=1 and (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_ioe group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }

/* PCS장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm , b.device_pcs_idx, b.std_date, b.device_stat, b.alarm_msg, b.ac_voltage, b.ac_power, b.ac_current, b.ac_freq, b.ac_set_power, b.ac_pf, b.dc_voltage, b.dc_power, b.dc_current, b.dc_freq, b.dc_set_power, b.dc_pf, b.pcs_status, b.pcs_status_nm, b.pcs_command, b.pcs_command_nm, b.today_c_energy, b.today_d_energy from ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_pcs_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarm_msg, ac_voltage, ac_power, ac_current, ac_freq, ac_set_power, ac_pf, dc_voltage, dc_power, dc_current, dc_freq, dc_set_power, dc_pf, std_date, reg_date , pcs_status, remote_mode, pcs_command, today_d_energy, today_c_energy, total_d_energy, total_c_energe , case pcs_status when 0 then 'OFF' when 1 then 'ON' when 2 then 'Fault' when 3 then 'Warning' else '' end as pcs_status_nm , case pcs_command when 0 then 'Stop' when 1 then 'Run' else '' end as pcs_command_nm from tb_device_pcs where 1=1 and (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_pcs group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }

/* BMS장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm , b.device_bms_idx, b.std_date, b.device_stat, b.device_stat_nm, b.sys_soc, b.curr_soc, b.sys_soh, b.sys_soh, b.sys_voltage, b.sys_current, b.dod from ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_bms_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, sys_soc, curr_soc, sys_soh, sys_voltage, sys_current, dod, std_date, reg_date ,case device_stat when 0 then 'Idle' when 1 then 'Charge' when 2 then 'Discharge' when 3 then 'MainS/W on/off' when 4 then 'Off-line' when 5 then 'Ready' when 6 then 'Fault' when 7 then 'Warning' else '' end as device_stat_nm from tb_device_bms where 1=1 and (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_bms group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }

/* PV장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm , b.device_pv_idx, b.std_date, b.device_stat, b.device_stat_nm, b.alarm_msg, b.temp, b.tot_power from ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_pv_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarm_msg, temp, tot_power, std_date, reg_date , case device_stat when 0 then 'Stop' when 1 then 'Run' when 2 then 'Fault' when 3 then 'Warning' else '' end as device_stat_nm from tb_device_pv where 1=1 and (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_pv group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }
